list.title: Events
list.search_aria: Search events by client, service, or city. Press slash to focus.

empty.no_results_description: No events matched. Try another status or clear the search text.
empty.no_events_description: Start by creating your first event.

table.caption: Events list with {{total}} results. Showing page {{page}} of {{pages}}.

delete_confirm.title: Delete event
delete_confirm.description: All event data, including payments and files, will be deleted. This action cannot be undone.

client_portal_share.title: Client portal
client_portal_share.description: A private link so your client can see the event, payment status, and key details.
client_portal_share.rotate_title: Invalidate the previous link and generate a new one
client_portal_share.share_message: Hi! Here you can see your event details: {{url}}
client_portal_share.confirm_rotate: Rotating the link will make the one you already shared stop working. Continue?
client_portal_share.confirm_revoke: This will disable the client link. Are you sure?
client_portal_share.toast_generate: Link generated. Share it with your client.
client_portal_share.toast_rotate: Link rotated. The previous one no longer works.
